analytics_notice: By participating in this beta, you consent to the collection of anonymous data, which we use to improve the product. You can find more information about which data we track in our <2>Privacy Policy</2> and our <6>Cookie Policy</6>.

call_ended_view.create_account_prompt: <0>Why not finish by setting up a password to keep your account?</0><1>You'll be able to keep your name and set an avatar for use on future calls</1>
call_ended_view.feedback_prompt: <0>We'd love to hear your feedback so we can improve your experience.</0>
call_ended_view.headline: {{displayName}}, your call has ended.
call_ended_view.not_now_button: Not now, return to home screen

developer_mode.always_show_iphone_earpiece: Show iPhone earpiece option on all platforms

custom_livekit_url.from_config: Currently, no overwrite is set. Url from well-known or config is used.
custom_livekit_url.label: Custom Livekit-url

developer_mode.duplicate_tiles_label: Number of additional tile copies per participant

Comptibility.description: Compatible with homeservers that do not support sticky events (but all other EC clients are v0.17.0 or later)
Comptibility.label: Compatibility: state events & multi SFU

Legacy.description: Compatible with old versions of EC that do not support multi SFU
Legacy.label: Legacy: state events & oldest membership SFU

Matrix_2_0.description: Compatible only with homservers supporting sticky events and all EC clients v0.17.0 or later
Matrix_2_0.label: Matrix 2.0: sticky events & multi SFU

developer_mode.mute_all_audio: Mute all audio (participants, reactions, join sounds)

disconnected_banner: Connectivity to the server has been lost.

error.call_not_found_description: <0>That link doesn't appear to belong to any existing call. Check that you have the right link, or <2>create a new one</2>.</0>
error.connection_lost_description: You were disconnected from the call.
error.e2ee_unsupported_description: Your web browser does not support encrypted calls. Supported browsers include Chrome, Safari, and Firefox 117+.
error.generic_description: Submitting debug logs will help us track down the problem.
error.insufficient_capacity_description: The server has reached its maximum capacity and you cannot join the call at this time. Try again later, or contact your server admin if the problem persists.
error.matrix_rtc_transport_missing: The server is not configured to work with {{brand}}. Please contact your server admin (Domain: {{domain}}, Error Code: {{ errorCode }}).
error.membership_manager_description: The Membership Manager had to shut down. This is caused by many consequtive failed network requests.
error.no_matrix_2_authorization_service: The authorization service for your media server (SFU) is out of date.
error.open_elsewhere_description: {{brand}} has been opened in another tab. If that doesn't sound right, try reloading the page.
error.room_creation_restricted_description: Call creation might be restricted to authorized users only. Try again later, or contact your server admin if the problem persists.
error.unexpected_ec_error: An unexpected error occurred (<0>Error Code:</0> <1>{{ errorCode }}</1>). Please contact your server admin.

group_call_loader.banned_body: You have been banned from the room.
group_call_loader.call_ended_body: You have been removed from the call.
group_call_loader.knock_reject_body: Your request to join was declined.

join_existing_call_modal.text: This call already exists, would you like to join?
join_existing_call_modal.title: Join existing call?

lobby.waiting_for_invite: Request sent! Waiting for permission to join…

login_auth_links: <0>Create an account</0> Or <2>Access as a guest</2>

rageshake_request_modal.body: Another user on this call is having an issue. In order to better diagnose these issues we'd like to collect a debug log.
rageshake_request_modal.title: Debug log request

recaptcha_ssla_caption: This site is protected by ReCAPTCHA and the Google <2>Privacy Policy</2> and <6>Terms of Service</6> apply.<9></9>By clicking "Register", you agree to our <12>Software and Services License Agreement (SSLA)</12>
register_auth_links: <0>Already have an account?</0><1><0>Log in</0> Or <2>Access as a guest</2></1>
room_auth_view_ssla_caption: By clicking "Join call now", you agree to our <2>Software and Services License Agreement (SSLA)</2>

settings.advanced_camera_description: Configure resolution, framerate, bitrate, and codec for camera video. Changes apply on next call join.
settings.advanced_screen_share_description: Configure resolution, framerate, bitrate, and codec for screen sharing
settings.audio_processing_description: Changes apply on next call join.

audio_tab.effect_volume_description: Adjust the volume at which reactions and hand raised effects play.
audio_tab.rnnoise_not_supported: (Enhanced noise suppression is not supported by this browser.)
audio_tab.rnnoise_preset_description: Pick a suppression profile. Stronger modes remove more keyboard noise but can sound more processed.

settings.background_blur_label: Blur the background of the video
settings.blur_not_supported_by_browser: (Background blur is not supported by this device.)
settings.feedback_tab_body: If you are experiencing issues or simply would like to provide some feedback, please send us a short description below.
settings.opt_in_description: <0></0><1></1>You may withdraw consent by unchecking this box. If you are currently in a call, this setting will take effect at the end of the call.

preferences_tab.developer_mode_label_description: Enable developer mode and show developer settings tab.
preferences_tab.introduction: Here you can configure extra options for an improved experience.
preferences_tab.reactions_play_sound_description: Play a sound effect when anyone sends a reaction into a call.
preferences_tab.reactions_show_description: Show an animation when anyone sends a reaction.
preferences_tab.show_hand_raised_timer_description: Show a timer when a participant raises their hand

unauthenticated_view_ssla_caption: By clicking "Go", you agree to our <2>Software and Services License Agreement (SSLA)</2>
